picks.title: BraidInfer Architecture: Persistent Megakernel RDNA3 LLM Inference Engine (gfx1100/RX 7900 XTX)
picks.why: Describes persistent megakernel architecture compiled by this build script.
picks.body_snippet:
BraidInfer Architecture: Persistent Megakernel RDNA3 LLM Inference Engine (gfx1100/RX 7900 XTX)

## 1. SINGLE-KERNEL DESIGN: Persistent Cooperative Megakernel

BraidInfer launches ONE persistent cooperative kernel per GPU that runs for the entire model lifetime:
- Entry: persistent_worker() in kerne

picks.why: Discusses -ffp-contract flag used in this build script.
picks.body_snippet: 5ax MROPE multi-GPU non-determinism research: 3 untried fixes ranked by P(fix)*P(cheap). H1 -ffp-contract=off compile flag (HIGHEST): build.rs:84,134 currently uses -ffp-contract=fast; all prior 'FMA inhibitor' tests used source-level volatile (IR-level, compiler can still fuse). picks.title: llamacpp-ed4u ROOT CAUSE CANDIDATE: ctx_dft and ctx_tgt use DIFFERENT SSM math paths.
picks.why: SSM math path differences relevant to KDA implementation.
picks.body_snippet:
llamacpp-ed4u ROOT CAUSE CANDIDATE: ctx_dft and ctx_tgt use DIFFERENT SSM math paths.

server-context.cpp:1128 sets cparams_mtp.n_rs_seq = 0 for the MTP draft context. ctx_tgt has n_rs_seq > 0 (hybrid SSM default).

In delta-net-base.cpp:567-626, build_recurrent_attn branches on 'keep = cparams.n_rs

picks.title: SP matmul and SP flash attention NaN root cause and fix.
picks.why: NaN root cause analysis relevant to attention/conv stability.
picks.body_snippet:
SP matmul and SP flash attention NaN root cause and fix.

ROOT CAUSE (matmul): ggml_cuda_op_mul_mat reads buffer->context->device to determine tensor location. SP matmul created fake tensor descriptors (X_slice, W_local, dst_g) that inherited buffer from primary GPU. On secondary GPUs, src1_on_devic

picks.title: SP tensor descriptor review: Root cause confirmed. ggml_cuda_op_mul_mat (ggml-cuda.cu:1618) casts src1->buffer->context to get device ID. SP creates stack-local tensor copies with ->data pointing to s
picks.why: SP tensor descriptor issues relevant to graph construction.
picks.body_snippet: SP tensor descriptor review: Root cause confirmed. ggml_cuda_op_mul_mat (ggml-cuda.cu:1618) casts src1->buffer->context to get device ID. SP creates stack-local tensor copies with ->data pointing to secondary GPU memory but ->buffer still referencing primary GPU's buffer. This causes wrong-device me

picks.title: llamacpp-ed4u SCOPE EXPANDED: spec-decode acceptance bug affects 35B-A3B-Q4_K MoE TOO, not just 27B-Q6_K dense.
picks.why: Confirms spec-decode acceptance bug affects Qwen3.5-35B-A3B MoE models.
picks.body_snippet:
llamacpp-ed4u SCOPE EXPANDED: spec-decode acceptance bug affects 35B-A3B-Q4_K MoE TOO, not just 27B-Q6_K dense.

35B-A3B-Q4_K p_min sweep (FA-on, --spec-type draft-mtp, --draft-max 4):
- 0.0: garbage (broken from start, 'system' token leak)
- 0.1: same garbage
- 0.3: degraded thinking, recovers to c
